heading: Appropriations for Commission
label: 3007 Appropriations for Commission
notes: Amendments1985—Subsec. (a). , amended subsec. (a) generally. Prior to amendment, subsec. (a) read as follows: “There is authorized to be appropriated to the Commission for each fiscal year and to remain available until expended $550,000 to assist in meeting the expenses of the Commission for the purpose of carrying out the provisions of this chapter, such appropriation to be disbursed on voucher to be approved by the Chairman of the Commission.”Pub. L. 95–4261976— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a) and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 94–534

children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Commission for each fiscal year such sums as may be necessary to enable it to carry out its duties and functions. Appropriations to the Commission are authorized to remain available until expended.

children.label: A
children.text: jointly by the Chairman and the Cochairman, or

children.label: B
children.text: by a majority of the members of the personnel and administration committee established pursuant to .section 3008(a) of this title

children.heading: Use of foreign currencies
children.label: b Use of foreign currencies
children.text: For purposes of , the Commission shall be deemed to be a standing committee of the Congress and shall be entitled to use funds in accordance with such sections.section 1754(b) of this title

children.heading: Official reception and representational expenses
children.label: c Official reception and representational expenses
children.text: Not to exceed $6,000 of the funds appropriated to the Commission for each fiscal year may be used for official reception and representational expenses.

children.heading: Foreign travel for official purposes
children.label: d Foreign travel for official purposes
children.text: Foreign travel for official purposes by Commission members and staff may be authorized by either the Chairman or the Cochairman.
